curation_notes: The patch modifies only one source file: packages/plugins/graphql-modules/src/index.ts. The fix replaces the manual operation controller lifecycle management (createOperationController in onContextBuilding, manual destroy in onExecute/onSubscribe) with app.createExecution() and app.createSubscription() which properly bind context to the asynchronous execution scope of each request. The vulnerability class race-condition matches the pre-assigned CWE-362 and the advisory description which explicitly describes a context race condition. No sibling files exist in the source directory. The scripts/match-graphql.js change is a build compatibility script unrelated to the vulnerability fix.
